overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive, modular, web-based School Management ERP tailored for Indian schools. It supports multi-school/branch operations, all user roles (Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Parent, Student, Driver), 15+ integrated modules, real WhatsApp messaging, PWA installation on Android/iOS, and complete session management with infinite archive.
features: Student Information Management with photo, credentials, transport integration
Fees Collection with class/section-wise plans, 4 receipt templates, balance carry-forward, real WhatsApp API
Attendance: RFID/QR/biometric, Welcome Display, summary by class/route
Exam Timetable Maker: wizard-based, drag-drop, combined Excel view
Teacher Timetable Maker: conflict-free auto-generation, per-period duration
Student Promotion Workflow with infinite session archive and month-wise dues carry-forward
HR with teacher subject-class range wizard and class teacher assignment
Template Studio: full design freedom for all 8 school document types
PWA: installable on Android/iOS with offline support and mobile bottom nav
Multi-role login: Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Parent, Student, Driver
